outbound_strategy.reply_style: Genuine compliments on AI art quality and technique, ask about tools or workflow. Keep it brief and enthusiastic without being sycophantic.

key_insights: EN market avg engagement rate is 5.14% across 5 competitors — mock_en_1 leads at 7.65% with 3.7 posts/day, suggesting higher frequency correlates with stronger engagement in this niche.

Top-performing EN tweets (mock_en_1 tweet mock_1001_8 at 10.9% ER, mock_en_5 tweet mock_1005_2 at 11.5% ER) both feature #stablediffusion combined with other niche tags, indicating tool-specific hashtags drive discovery.

mock_en_5 achieves the second-highest engagement (7.13%) despite having the fewest followers (16,482) and lowest posting frequency (1.6/day) — quality over quantity approach is viable but higher frequency top performers still dominate total reach.
#AIbeauty is trending with a sample tweet hitting 4,600 likes — capitalizing on this trend today could boost visibility significantly.
A viral post by @viral_creator reached 10,000 likes at 12% ER — engaging with this creator's content could expose our account to a highly active audience segment.
risks: Posting 4x/day is above current EN competitor average of 3.1 — monitor follower response to ensure we are not over-saturating feeds.
Heavy reliance on #AIgirl may attract bot followers rather than genuine engagement — track follower quality metrics.

outbound_strategy.reply_style: 日本語で丁寧かつ親しみやすいトーン。AIアートの技術や美しさを褒め、使用ツールやプロンプトについて自然に質問する。短くフレンドリーに。

key_insights: JP market avg engagement rate (6.56%) is 28% higher than EN (5.14%) despite having 21% fewer average followers (20,582 vs 26,223) — JP audience is more actively engaged per follower.
JP competitors post at 3.9/day vs EN's 3.1/day — the JP market rewards consistent daily presence. mock_jp_3 achieves 7.49% ER with 3.7 posts/day, and mock_jp_1 hits 7.24% ER at 4.0 posts/day.

#stablediffusion dominates JP hashtag usage (12 instances across 3 competitors) — JP audience is more tool-specific in their discovery behavior compared to EN which leads with character tags (#AIgirl).
mock_jp_3's top tweet (mock_2003_7) hit 11.2% ER with 2,000 likes using only #stablediffusion — single strong hashtag can outperform multi-tag strategies in JP market.
mock_jp_1's tweet mock_2001_8 achieved 12.1% ER (1,993 likes) with #stablediffusion, confirming the tag's outsized pull in the JP market. Building authority around this hashtag should be a priority.
risks: JP competitor pool is smaller (3 accounts) — conclusions drawn from limited data may not generalize. Continue expanding JP competitor tracking.
High JP engagement rates could partly reflect smaller, tighter community — as our account grows, per-follower engagement may naturally decline.
